data.title: ticket create exits 144 (timeout) for stories with long --description heredocs
data.description: During /dso:preplanning, three attempts to create story S5 with a long --description via heredoc timed out with exit code 144. The ticket was silently created on the first two attempts (the command created the ticket but the output pipe was killed before the ticket ID was returned), causing duplicate tickets. The third attempt succeeded only after using no --description flag. Suspected cause: ticket-create.sh or git commit operation exceeds the ~73s tool timeout ceiling when the description payload is large. This is consistent with exit 144 (SIGURG/tool timeout). Steps to reproduce: run .claude/scripts/dso ticket create story with a --description of ~1000+ characters using heredoc. Expected: command returns ticket ID within timeout. Actual: exit 144, ticket may or may not have been created silently. Risk: duplicate tickets are created invisibly when the command times out after writing but before printing the ID.
